final:
// // This module implements a register that holds a 32-bit Control and Status Register (CSR). On a negative clock edge, if the reset signal is inactive, the CSR resets to one. Otherwise, if the CSRSel signal is deasserted, the CSR will be updated with the value from the input rs1_to_csr, allowing for selective unloading of the CSR based on the control signal.
module top_module(
	input clk,
	input reset,

	input [31:0] rs1_to_csr,
	input CSRSel,

	output reg [31:0] csr
);always @(posedge clk) begin
	if (reset) begin
		csr <= 32'd0;
	end else begin
		if (CSRSel) begin
			csr <= rs1_to_csr;
		end
	end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a register that holds a 32-bit Control and Status Register (CSR). On a negative clock edge, if the reset signal is inactive, the CSR resets to one. Otherwise, if the CSRSel signal is deasserted, the CSR will be updated with the value from the input rs1_to_csr, allowing for selective unloading of the CSR based on the control signal.
